issue_title: Cell border is not printed when a cell has rowspan which breaks page.
issue_body_preview:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/10201833/55600585-230afe00-57b9-11e9-8b44-aa9c17199e1a.png)

When a rowspan breaks through a page, the first several rows with rowspan cells in the second page has no border.
test_description_zh: 创建一个包含跨行单元格（rowspan）的表格，使该跨行单元格恰好跨越分页位置，生成 PDF 后观察第二页中带有 rowspan 的前几行单元格的边框渲染情况。
expected_result_zh: 跨页的 rowspan 单元格在第二页中应正确显示完整的单元格边框，所有边框线均正常绘制，不应出现边框缺失的情况。
